federation_targets.name: XanaNode Protocol Substrate
federation_targets.description: A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Protocol repository, preserving the protocol's schemas, registries, specs, governance artifacts, and canonical documents while carrying lower-level repository files as attached assets when they do not deserve independent node status.

federation_targets.name: XanaNode Canonical Substrate
federation_targets.description: The canonical XanaNode substrate for protocol vocabulary, project identity, governance, software stack records, raw source snapshots, branding, and self-referential examples.

federation_targets.name: XanaNode Core SDK Substrate
federation_targets.description: A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Core SDK repository, preserving its implementation identity, schemas, registries, templates, executable-contract artifacts, and key documents while carrying lower-level repository files as attached assets unless they have independent semantic weight.

federation_targets.name: XanaNode Workspace Substrate
federation_targets.description: A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Workspace repository, preserving the workspace engine, CLI surface, templates, packaged executable artifacts, and key documents while carrying lower-level repository files as attached assets unless they merit their own nodes.

federation_targets.name: XanaNode Studio Substrate
federation_targets.description: A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Studio repository, preserving the Studio application identity, major authoring artifacts, and key documents while carrying lower-level implementation files as attached assets unless they are independently citable or governable.

federation_targets.name: XanaNode Mobile Substrate
federation_targets.description: A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Mobile repository, preserving the mobile application's identity, capture workflows, and key documents while carrying lower-level implementation files as attached assets unless they have independent semantic weight.

federation_targets.name: XanaNode Hugo Theme Substrate
federation_targets.description: A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Hugo repository, preserving the Hugo projection layer's identity, projection-facing documents, and key theme artifacts while carrying lower-level implementation files as attached assets unless they deserve their own nodes.

federation_targets.name: XanaNode Alphabet Substrate
federation_targets.description: A deliberately small example substrate with a start trail, A-Z letter nodes, typed relationships, and bundled media assets for every letter.

federation_targets.name: XanaNode Lost Lineage Substrate
federation_targets.description: A lineage substrate for the historical and conceptual path into XanaNode.
